calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Gregory Posey.
Dept. 514. Judge: Newton J. Lam. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Bryana S. McGuirk, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Harjeet Singh Gargaria, who was placed under oath and testified.
Corey Lamb, Claims Administrator for plaintiff Desoto Cab Company, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Gregory Posey.
Plaintiffs' complaint was filed on April 21, 2017 and served on May 17, 2017.
Statement of Damages was served on May 17, 2017 and filed on May 3, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on July 18, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 1, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Harjeet Singh Gargaria and Desoto Cab Company, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Gregory Posey, as follows:

PLAINTIFF HARJEET SINGH GARGARIA:
Damages - $10,000.00.
Costs - $234.50.
Total - $10,234.50.

PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC:
Damages - $9,895.41.
Costs - $234.50.
Total - $10,129.91.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-22-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Continued To Mar-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Dec-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
